The Protagonist
Brian
A former top agent who went rogue not out of anger, but out of a question no one would answer. He does not kill. Every person he passes will wake up again.
Click anywhere to continue
Where It Starts
The Mission
21 February 2025. A family of five. Four killed on orders he followed while already doubting. One spared with no reason given. The doubt never left.
Click anywhere to continue
.
The Organisation
They built him into the best they had. They used him without his knowledge. They speak in policy. They do not name what they do.
Click anywhere to continue
The Mirror
Ryan
The one who was spared. Raised on a lie, shaped into a weapon pointed at Brian. When they meet, Brian is not looking at an enemy. He is looking at his own past.
Click anywhere to continue
The Story
Awakening
The best assassin who ever lived. Brian carried out a mission on 21 February 2025 that he did not understand. Four killed, one spared. That one was Ryan. Years later, Brian decided to take down the corrupted world, only to find that Ryan wanted his revenge. Two people built by the same hand, pointed at each other. Victims facing the same mirror.
